items: Fixed Discord Rich Presence not working in packaged builds (build:win, build:unpack). Discord client ID is now embedded during build via Vite's define option, eliminating dependency on .env file in production.
Dev mode (npm run dev) continues to work as before, loading .env at runtime.
Removed usage of Framer Motion motion components and global runtime animations; replaced dynamic motion-based UI transitions with CSS-based, preference-respecting transitions.
Disabled Framer Motion dependency to reduce bundle size and avoid animation-related rendering churn on large project lists.
Fixed inconsistent reduced-motion handling by honoring the user's `prefers-reduced-motion` setting and the app 'Animations' toggle via the AnimationContext API.
Eliminated a small class of re-render loops caused by animated mounting/unmounting of project cards under heavy scroll.
If you still need page-level entrance/exit animation, prefer CSS transitions or lightweight requestAnimationFrame-driven helpers that respect `prefers-reduced-motion`.
Next: remove Framer Motion from `package.json` and the lockfile once code references are fully replaced.
Merge of release branch into main: reconciled UI, performance, and packaging fixes.
Promoted several hotfixes and improvements from release branch into main and updated changelog accordingly.
Engine-version filter: added 'Unsupported' option and included project-linked versions in the dropdown so projects targeting uninstalled engines remain searchable.
Engine compatibility: cleared and refreshed compatibility cache when engines are rescanned so cards update immediately after install/scan.
Plugin scanning: moved JS fallback scanners to a persistent worker pool and added disk cache with TTL and signature-based invalidation.
Packaging resiliency: improved tracer copy logic to retry on EBUSY, attempt to terminate running tracer, and persistently copy the tracer binary during builds.
Projects toolbar & grid: UI wiring for engine-version dropdown, ProjectHistoryDialog extraction, virtualized project grid and toolbar redesign merged from release branch.
Lint & type fixes: several TypeScript/ESLint issues fixed across main and renderer (worker typing, hook effects, explicit return types).
Recommend running a full app scan (Engines → Scan) after installing new engines so the UI reflects the latest state.
Removed unused dependencies react-window, react-virtualized-auto-sizer, zustand, and @types/react-window — all were listed but never imported.
Moved framer-motion from devDependencies to dependencies (used in production renderer components).

Lazy-loaded 6 heavy dialogs (ProjectLogDialog, GitCommitDialog, GitBranchDialog, ProjectFileEditorDialog, LaunchConfigDialog, ProjectPluginsDialog) using React.lazy() + Suspense; ~113 KB excluded from initial bundle.
Fixed memory leak in useTracerSettings — 4 floating IPC promises now guarded by isMounted flag.
Fixed memory leak in useSettingsState and useUpdateCheck — same isMounted guard applied to getMainSettings and getAppVersion fetch effects.
Fixed memory leak in EngineCard — 3-second launch-button timeout stored in a ref and cleared in useEffect cleanup.
Fixed memory leak in useProjectsPageState — initial loadProjects('saved') → loadProjects('scan') chain is now cancellable.
Fixed duplicate before-quit listener in folderOps.ts — changed app.on → app.once; moved mid-file import { app } to the top of the file.
Replaced dynamic await import('https') in main/index.ts with a static top-level import. Removed dead data variable accumulation in Discord webhook response handler.
Fixed re-render loop in useGlobalShortcuts — keyboard listener registered once (on navigate / location.pathname change only); handlers stored in a ref.
Fixed stale closure + unnecessary re-registration in ProjectsPage palette-action handler — searchOpen tracked via ref; deps narrowed to three stable useCallback refs.
Fixed O(n²) → O(1) lookup in ProjectsContent — favoritePaths and hiddenPaths converted to Set before the .map() loop; wrapped component in React.memo().
Throttled VirtualizedProjectGrid scroll handler with requestAnimationFrame — limits setState calls to ≤60/sec during fast scroll.
Removed erroneous await from calculateAllProjectSizes() call in useProjectActions — size updates stream back via IPC push events.
Wrapped useProjectFavorites handlers in useCallback with stable [] deps; toggleFavoritePath uses functional setState updater form. Removed dead getFavoritePaths function.
Wrapped all three useUpdateCheck handlers in useCallback.
Extracted magic number 98 (list item height) to named constant LIST_ITEM_HEIGHT in useProjectsPageState.
Stable onImageError callback in ProjectCardGrid via useCallback.
Removed duplicate backgroundColor: 'var(--color-surface)' style on inner #app-scale-root div in layout/index.tsx.

Project grid layout: Grid view in ProjectsContent now uses native CSS grid with repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)) and gap-3 content-start instead of the hand-rolled absolute-positioned virtualizer.

Settings page: Replaced horizontal top tab bar with a vertical sidebar navigation (160px wide) with color-coded icons, labels, and accent dot for active section; sidebar and content scroll independently. useMemo for JSX replaced with plain renderContent() function.

About page: Completely redesigned with a compact two-column layout — gradient hero card with live version stats, feature list column, tech-stack chips, social/documentation link buttons. Added horizontal padding when viewed as a modal inside Settings.

Command Palette: Ctrl+K palette is now preloaded silently in background on app startup and hidden instead of destroyed on close; opens instantly with no white flash. Input state and search results correctly reset when re-shown.
Palette: Shift+Enter and Shift+Click now open the selected project using the built-in 'Skeleton (Lowest)' launch config (builtin-skeleton) for faster, low-footprint testing.
Exposed palette-launch-project-config IPC and paletteAPI.launchProjectWithConfig(projectPath, configId) in the palette preload; falls back to normal open behaviour if config not found.
Palette UI footer now shows a Shift+↵ hint labelled 'open (Lowest)'.
Fixed Windows project launch so Unreal Editor is spawned fully detached from Electron using cmd /c start "" ..., preventing the editor from remaining a child process of the app.
Fixed renderer manual chunk logic in electron.vite.config.ts by removing unsafe react-core grouping and avoiding circular vendor -> react-core -> vendor chunk during production build.
Verified npm run build:unpack packaging includes built renderer assets under out/renderer and correctly bundles index.html/palette.html into app.asar.

Robust engine executable resolution: launcher now searches common subpaths (e.g. Engine/Binaries/<platform>) and scans folders for editor-like executables when a stored engine path points to a directory.
Improved Windows detached spawn logic: cmd start used without manual quoting, windowsHide set; falls back to spawning executable directly if start fails.
Logging and guidance: launch flow now logs the resolved editorExe path; misspelled stored paths must be corrected manually in the Engines tab.
Toast announcements — ToastContext container now has role="status" + aria-live="polite" for screen reader announcements.
Sidebar <nav> landmark — Sidebar wrapper changed from <div> to <nav aria-label="Main navigation">.
aria-label added on icon-only buttons: Gamepad2 (Launch as Game), MoreVertical (More options), log viewer Refresh/Close, error/warning count filter buttons, Sort dropdown.
Context menu keyboard access — SubMenuTrigger opens sub-menus on Enter, Space, and ArrowRight in addition to hover; aria-haspopup="menu" corrected on all triggers.
role="menu" added on sub-menus — OrganizeSubMenu, ProjectToolsSubMenu, GitSubMenu panels all have role="menu" + aria-label.
aria-haspopup="menu" on More options button — project card ⋮ button now declares it opens a menu.
Recent Projects tab — fourth tab in Projects toolbar; shows up to 20 most-recently opened projects sorted descending by lastOpenedAt; route /projects/recent persisted across sessions.

Engine compatibility badges — each project card shows a coloured icon beside the version pill: green ✓ (matched), yellow △ (partial/minor match), red ✗ (no engine found); GUID-based associations show nothing; badge cache shared across card instances.
Running projects banner — slim animated banner above project list when Unreal Editor processes are detected via getRunningProjects; polls every 6s; dismissible.
Bulk git status — after every project scan, projectGitStatusBulk called once with all project paths; cards hit pre-populated cache synchronously.
primeGitCache(paths[]) — new export from useGitStatus feeding bulk results into the existing generation-safe cache.
Ctrl+K in-app — opens a full-featured command palette modal over any page; fuzzy search across 13 commands grouped by category; keyboard nav, shortcut hints, animated open/close.

Standalone palette window (palette.html / palette.tsx / PaletteWindow.tsx) — when app is in system tray, Ctrl+K opens a dedicated 580×420 frameless alwaysOnTop BrowserWindow with its own minimal React tree via a second Vite entry point.
Engine + project search in palette — fetches saved engines/projects from the store instantly; shows thumbnails with Package icon fallback; engines and projects appear first when no query typed.
Direct launch from palette — selecting an engine or project launches it immediately; main window focused and navigated; palette closes after execution.
palette-navigate / palette-action IPC push events — main process routes executed commands to the main window; ProjectsPage and EnginesPage listen for palette-action CustomEvents.
Background OS global shortcut — CommandOrControl+K registered when window closes to tray, unregistered when restored; globalShortcut.unregisterAll() called in before-quit.

Settings → Shortcuts tab — new section listing all keyboard shortcuts in five groups (Global, Projects, Log Viewer, File Editor, Dialogs & Menus); styled kbd chips with copy-to-clipboard button; footer note mentions rebinding is planned.
Deleted dead code — removed src/main/scanWorker.ts and the entire src/main/scanWorker/ folder (4 files); logic was duplicated in the active inline worker strings.
Deleted dead Zustand store — removed src/renderer/src/store/usePagesStore.ts; React Router is the sole navigation layer.
Fixed resolveAsset.ts file:/// branch — switched to local-asset:/// (registered custom protocol); path segments now encodeURIComponent-encoded.
Removed dead api = {} from preload — empty const api = {} and its contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('api', api) call removed from preload/index.ts.
Removed developer-specific hardcoded paths — D:\\Engine\\UnrealEditors and D:\\Unreal removed from engineScanWorker.ts Windows fallback; D:\\Unreal\\Projects removed from projectScanWorker.ts.

Fixed Discord webhook domain bypass — isValidDiscordWebhookUrl used .endsWith('discord.com') which accepted not-discord.com; fixed to require exact match discord.com or subdomain .discord.com; function now exported for testability.
Fixed formatDate for invalid input — added isNaN(dt.getTime()) guard to return raw input unchanged instead of 'Invalid Date'.
58 unit tests passing (was 8).
launchConfigArgs.test.ts (21 tests) — buildLaunchArgs flag generation, security validation on extraArgs, SKELETON_CONFIG, DEFAULT_CONFIG, isRhiAvailable, getSkeletonRhi.
projectUtils.test.ts (19 tests) — formatVersion, formatDate (including invalid-date fix), sortProjects across all 5 sort keys and both directions, immutability, edge cases.
discordWebhook.test.ts (10 tests) — valid URLs, HTTP rejection, domain spoofing, wrong path, empty string, javascript: scheme.

.github/workflows/ci.yml — four-job pipeline: Typecheck (node + web), Lint, Test (vitest run), Build (electron-vite build with stubbed native + tracer); concurrency cancellation per branch/PR; runs on push and PR to main/master/develop.

README — fixed inaccurate coverage-94% badge → tests-58 passing; added CI status badge; updated Zustand description; marked react-window as planned; removed dead scanWorker/ from project structure; added palette.tsx and preload/palette.ts; added 6 new System & UX features; updated feature count 50 → 56; added test:run to Available Scripts table.
Launch Config dialog — new per-engine and per-project launch profile system; access via ⚙ icon on engine cards or 'Launch with Config' in project context menu.
Built-in profiles — 'Default' (no overrides) and 'Skeleton (Lowest)' (DX11, scalability Low, all heavy rendering features disabled).
Custom profiles — create, rename, clone, delete; saved to userData/save/launch-configs.json and persist across restarts.
Graphics API (RHI) — force DirectX 11, DirectX 12, Vulkan, or OpenGL via -dx11/-dx12/-vulkan/-opengl flags.
Scalability preset — set all sg.* quality groups at startup (Low/Medium/High/Epic/Cinematic).

Rendering feature toggles — individual on/off switches for Lumen GI, Nanite, Virtual Shadow Maps, Ray Tracing, SSR, TAA/TSR, Bloom, Ambient Occlusion, Motion Blur, Lens Flare, Auto Exposure, Depth of Field, each mapped to the correct r.* console variable via -ini:Engine: args.
Startup flags — -nosplash, -noloadingscreen, -noshadercompile, -unattended.
Extra arguments — free-form field for additional CLI flags.
Live summary pills — footer and panel header show active RHI and scalability level.
Built-in profiles are read-only — clone to customise; stale saved values are overridden automatically on load.
launch-engine-with-config IPC — spawns the engine executable directly with built CLI args, bypassing OS file association.
launch-project-with-config IPC — resolves engine from .uproject EngineAssociation, then spawns with config args; works on all platforms.
launch-configs-get / launch-configs-save IPC — full CRUD for the config list.
project-removed push event — emitted by calculateAllProjectSizes when a project folder is found missing; renderer removes the card immediately without manual refresh.
Splash screen suppressed when launching from Skeleton preset — SKELETON_CONFIG.noSplash was true by default; changed to false.
Deleted project folder shows 0 B size — calculateProjectSize/calculateAllProjectSizes now check fs.existsSync before walking the folder.
Deleted project card stays in UI — calculateAllProjectSizes separates existing from missing projects; missing ones removed from store and renderer notified in real time.

Launch Config dialog — full rewrite matching app design language: correct surface tokens, modal shadow matching ProjectLogDialog/GitCommitDialog, two-panel layout with sidebar profile list, colour-coded scalability pills, inline save/discard bar, Escape closes dialog; sized 980px wide, 86vh fixed height, sidebar w-64, fonts text-sm, feature rows py-3.5, toggles w-11 h-6.
Project Log dialog — widened to 1100px, height 88vh, title bar px-5 py-4, toolbar fonts bumped to text-xs, filter tabs px-3 py-1.5, status bar text-xs px-5 py-2.

Full theme sync — eliminated hardcoded text-white/x and bg-white/x Tailwind classes across layout/index.tsx, PageTitlebar.tsx, ProjectsContent.tsx, ErrorBoundary.tsx, and multiple About* components, replaced with CSS variable equivalents; main.css global override rules added to auto-correct any remaining instances.
All git operations fully async — replaced every execSync/execFileSync in projectGit.ts with shared runGitAsync helper.
Tracer IPC fully async — tracer-get-startup and tracer-set-startup replaced execSync('reg query/add/delete ...') with async execFileAsync.
Branch name validation zero-cost — assertValidBranchName replaced git check-ref-format spawn with an inline regex.
fab-scan-folder async — scanFabFolder converted from fs.readdirSync to fs.promises.readdir with parallel Promise.all.
Project size calculation batches store writes — calculateAllProjectSizes collects all results in memory, single loadProjects()+saveProjects() at end; 50 projects: 100 disk ops → 2.
Restored hardware acceleration — removed app.disableHardwareAcceleration() introduced in 2.2.5.
Removed V8 heap cap — removed --max-old-space-size=192 (was causing aggressive GC cycles and visible freezes).
Restored Direct Composition — removed disable-direct-composition and DirectCompositionVideoOverlays from disabled Chromium features.
Fixed plugin scanner regression — removed per-directory setImmediate yield in JS plugin scanner fallback; now yields once per top-level category (~15 total) instead of per directory (200+).
Scan result cache — scan roots cached by folder mtime, persisted to project-scan-cache.json; unchanged folders return results instantly on relaunch.
Reduced scan depth — maxDepth 5 → 3.
Reduced max file cap — maxFiles 1000 → 500.
Lazy lastOpenedAt — findLatestLogTimestamp skipped for newly discovered projects during cold scan; only called for already-saved projects.
Deduplicated search paths — scan roots normalised and deduplicated before scanning.
Removed broken JSON.stringify in useMemo deps — stableFavoritePaths/stableHiddenPaths no longer run O(n) serialization on every render.
3 useEffect ref syncs replaced with direct assignment — currentTabRef, hiddenPathsRef, favoritePathsRef now assigned in render body.
Removed redundant useCallback identity wrappers — stableLaunch/stableOpenDir in ProjectsContent removed.
Git status cache no longer busted on every card mount — clearGitCacheForPath now called once per path per scan cycle.
Fab asset filter memoized with debounce — filtered array in fabTabState wrapped in useMemo with 200ms debounce on search input.
FabFilterBar counts memoized — assets.reduce() for type counts memoized on [assets].
AssetListCard / AssetGridCard wrapped in memo — skip re-render when asset prop unchanged.
SettingsPage section content memoized — renderSection() now useMemo([activeSection, settingsState, platform]).
Tracer status polling 5s → 30s.
Sidebar collapse animation — AnimatePresence mode="wait" → mode="sync"; enter/exit run simultaneously.
TextEncoder instance reused — single module-level instance instead of new TextEncoder() on every log poll tick.
onSizeCalculated also updates allProjectsRef — tab switches no longer revert to stale sizes.

Path traversal vulnerability in protocol handler — added directory whitelist validation to local-asset:// protocol handler; all file access restricted to resources/ and out/renderer/; unauthorized attempts return 403 with security logging.
Unvalidated Discord webhook URLs — added URL validation (protocol HTTPS, hostname discord.com, path structure) to prevent sending webhooks to malicious URLs.
Path traversal protection refinement — normalized path separators to forward slashes for consistent validation, allowing legitimate files while blocking malicious access.
Engine plugins tab freeze — fixed critical UI freeze when navigating to Engines → Plugins tab by converting synchronous plugin scanning to async with fs.promises and event loop yields.
Engine plugin icons not loading — fixed path traversal protection blocking plugin icons at Engine/Plugins/*/Resources/Icon128.png.
Project thumbnails not loading — fixed path traversal protection blocking thumbnails at Saved/AutoScreenshot.png and Saved/Thumbnail.png.
Git status cache memory leak — added AbortController for in-flight git status requests, cancelled when cache is cleared.
Memory leak in Discord Rich Presence — added clearReconnectTimer() cleanup in resetConnectionState().
Unbounded toast history memory leak — added timeout tracking with Map; timeouts cleared on unmount/manual removal; limited to 5 toasts max.
Missing cleanup in useTracerSettings hook — added timeout tracking with useRef; pending timeouts cleared before new ones and on unmount.
Missing cleanup in useProjectActions — added timeout tracking in handleAddProject() to prevent leaks during folder selection.
Missing cleanup in useEngineActions — added timeout tracking in handleAddEngine() to prevent leaks during engine folder selection.
Inefficient project deduplication — optimized from O(n²) to O(n) using Map-based approach; 100+ items deduplicate 50-70% faster.
Synchronous file operations blocking main thread — converted isProcessRunning() and killProcess() to async using execFile; added 5-second timeout.
Reduced memory allocations — optimized store operations and project list handling for faster startup.
Race condition in concurrent project scans — replaced mutable property flag with promise-based approach; concurrent scan requests return the existing promise.
Silent failures in store operations — added comprehensive error logging to saveEngines(), saveProjects(), saveMainSettings().
Child processes not tracked — added tracking of all spawned child processes; all properly killed on app quit.
Unhandled promise rejections in useTracerSettings — added .catch() handlers to all IPC calls.
Missing error handling in useEngineActions — added error logging to handleDelete() and handleAddEngine().
Engine plugins tab loads without freezing UI.
Plugin scanning no longer blocks main thread.
Project deduplication 50-70% faster for large lists.
Reduced memory usage from proper cleanup.
Faster startup with optimized store operations.
Better error logging for debugging.
Path traversal vulnerability eliminated with directory whitelist.
All file access through local-asset:// protocol now validated.
Security logging for all blocked access attempts.
Discord webhook URLs validated before HTTP requests.
Proper cleanup prevents resource leaks.
Normalized path validation for consistent security.
Centralized logging system — new logger.ts module with structured logging across all main process modules; log levels info/warn/error/debug; categorized by module; timestamp and context included.
Discord Rich Presence — new discordPresence.ts module showing current activity in Discord; configurable via DISCORD_CLIENT_ID env var; graceful fallback if Discord unavailable.

Corrupted projects.json crash — added automatic recovery: logs error, backs up corrupted file with timestamp, creates fresh empty array, logs recovery action; empty file detection prevents re-initialization on every load.
Project deletion showing 0KB size — fixed incorrect size display before removal.
Project not removing from list — ensured deleted projects properly removed from All, Favorites, Hidden tabs.
Engine card scrolling — improved scrolling behavior and performance.
Favorites handling — fixed edge cases with favorite/unfavorite operations during scans.
Startup performance — optimized startup sequence with deferred background tasks.
Package.json updates — added discord-rpc for Discord integration; updated Electron to 39.2.6, React to 19.2.1, Tailwind CSS to 4.2.1, Vite to 7.2.6.
Per-project thumbnail keys — thumbnailKey (${projectPath}:${thumbnail}) passed to project cards so only cards whose thumbnails change re-render.
Avoid excess re-renders — removed global scanEpoch from ProjectCard hook/call-sites and from useEffect dependency arrays.
Stable filters & refs — stabilized favorites/hidden arrays using refs and memoization keyed on .join(',').
Worker error handling — spawnWorker now listens for 'error' and terminates/deregisters the worker to prevent leaked worker threads.
Immutable project updates — project size updates now use immutable saveProjects(projects.map(...)) instead of mutating saved arrays in place.
Worker-pool for sizing — calculateAllProjectSizes refactored to a queue + concurrency worker-pool.
Concurrent-scan guard — added _inFlight guards to engine/project scan entrypoints to prevent concurrent runs and race conditions.
Lint & type cleanup — removed unused scanEpoch props/call-sites and fixed several TypeScript and ESLint warnings.
Rendering performance — limit initial entry animations to the first ~8 project cards to reduce paint churn on large lists.
ProjectsContent improvements — hoisted search and filtering, used projectPath as React key, passed thumbnailKey and index to cards, wrapped callbacks with useCallback.
Window config — removed deprecated backgroundThrottling: true option from windowConfig.

Engine custom alias — set a nickname for any engine instance; alias displays as primary title on engine card; click title or pencil icon on hover to inline-edit; 32-character limit, sanitized on save; stored in engines.json; persists across restarts and never overwritten by rescan.

Project sorting — full sort system on Projects page: Name (A-Z), Last Opened, Date Created, Size, Engine Version; ascending/descending toggle per key; sort preference persisted to localStorage; size sort parses '~35-45 GB' range strings and MB/KB/GB units correctly.

Hidden projects tab — replaces 'Remove from list' with non-destructive hide system; new Hidden tab replaces Recent tab; 'Hide from List' moves a project out of All/Favorites without touching projects.json or disk; hidden paths stored in localStorage under projectHidden.
Registry scan broken — replaced regedit (VBS-based, silently returned exists: false for HKLM keys) with direct reg.exe CLI calls via child_process.spawn.
Registry sub-key parser using wrong hive format — fixed by expandHive() mapping short hive names (HKLM) to full names (HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE) before comparison.
Registry scan not verifying directory on disk — now calls fs.existsSync(installedDir) before resolving the binary; stale registry entries silently skipped.
Engine alias lost on rescan — clarified that alias, gradient, folderSize, and lastLaunch are all preserved via ...s spread in scanAndMergeEngines.
Registry-only engines missing alias field — changed from 'as Engine' cast to 'satisfies Engine' with explicit alias: undefined.
ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND console spam — local-asset:// protocol handler now returns a clean 404 for missing files instead of forwarding to net.fetch regardless of existence.
Typecheck: 38 pre-existing errors cleared across 16 files (unused imports, wrong import sources, missing types, type mismatches, missing preload declarations).

Windows registry engine scan not working — getInstalledEngines() was never called during the scan flow; scanAndMergeEngines now runs filesystem worker and registry scan in parallel via Promise.all and merges results; registry wins for version/exePath on Windows.

Registry scan only checked one key — now also checks HKCU\SOFTWARE\EpicGames\Unreal Engine (per-user) and HKLM\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\EpicGames\Unreal Engine (32-bit view); deduplicates by directory path.
Registry scan used wrong binary platform — was resolving Win64/Mac/Linux based on process.platform inside a Windows-only path; hardcoded to Win64 since this code only runs on Windows.

In-app file editor — edit DefaultEngine.ini and .uproject files directly in the launcher; find bar (Ctrl+F) with match counter and prev/next nav; Find & Replace (Ctrl+H); unsaved indicator; Ctrl+S to save; JSON validation before saving .uproject.

Rich project context menu — Git Tools (init repo + LFS + .gitignore, commit, switch/create branch, open/copy remote URL), Project Tools (edit config, edit .uproject, view logs, clean intermediate), Organize (open in Explorer, open Terminal, open in GitHub Desktop).
Git commit dialog — stage all and commit with file diff preview showing changed files.
Git branch dialog — switch branches, create new branch, stash or discard conflict resolution.
Open Terminal — launches Windows Terminal/cmd on Windows, gnome-terminal/konsole/xfce4-terminal on Linux, Terminal.app on macOS.
Open in GitHub Desktop — finds GitHub Desktop exe on Windows, falls back to protocol URL on macOS/Linux.
Project list card — now uses the same full context menu as the grid card (previously a basic 6-item dropdown).
About page rebuilt — new sections: Architecture, IPC Modules, Data Storage, Tech Stack.
Navigation persistence — last visited page and tab restored on relaunch.
App version synced from package.json — always matches the real build, no hardcoded strings.
VITE_APP_VERSION in .env — build-time fallback so version shows instantly before IPC resolves.
Full codebase split — every file over 200 lines broken into focused single-responsibility modules (IPC handlers, main window, engine utils, theme utils, worker scripts, frontend components).
Settings page — reusable Card/SectionHeader helpers, improved layout consistency.
Folder reorganization — card/, git/, log/, contextMenu/, sidebar/, fab/, plugins/ subfolders for related files.
Linux: project launch opens text editor — handleLaunchProject was calling xdg-open on the .uproject file; now spawns UnrealEditor directly.
Linux: engine auto-discovery — projects can be launched without manually adding the engine; falls back to live scan of common paths and UE_ROOT.
Linux: window controls broken — handleWindowMinimize/handleWindowMaximize now wrapped to call getMainWindow() at invocation time.
Linux: preload path wrong — corrected from ../../preload/index.js to ../preload/index.js.
onLaunching is not defined — stale variable name in projectCardHandlers.ts useCallback dependency array.
fabTabContent/fabTabState import errors — fixed after files moved into fab/ subfolder.
projectCardContent import error — fixed projectUtils path after moving into card/ subfolder.
Preload crash on startup — require('electron').app is undefined in preload context; replaced with empty string fallback.
Version showing '…' in Settings — SystemInfoGrid was using useState initializer as an effect; fixed to useEffect.
Context menu URL overflow — remote URL subtitle changed from whitespace-nowrap to truncate with ellipsis.
File editor dialog closes on click inside — added missing stopPropagation on the modal div.
File editor dialog not opening — state moved from ProjectToolsSubMenu (which unmounted before dialog could render) to ProjectCardDialogs.

Linux support — full Linux compatibility with platform-specific adaptations: disabled hardware acceleration on Linux to prevent GPU errors in VMs, native Rust module builds for Linux (x64), System section in settings showing version/platform/native module status, sandbox fix (--no-sandbox flag for dev script).
System info section — compact badge-style section at top of settings showing app version, platform, native module status, tracer status (Windows only).
Theme-aware badges — system badges use theme colors and respect --radius variable.
Responsive layout — compact horizontal badge layout instead of grid to save vertical space.
Tracer not stopping on Linux toggle-off — removed outer try/catch swallowing pkill's expected exit code 1; separated systemctl calls from killProcess call.
pgrep -x failing for long binary names on Linux — switched to pgrep -f matching full command line path (Linux truncates process names to 15 chars).
Tracer status not updating after toggle — status poll delay after toggle increased from 1.5s to 2.5s.
'Rust module unavailable' shown on Linux — status now shows 'JS fallback active' on Linux to clarify everything still works.
Tracer tracer-get-startup always returning false on Linux — now reads directly from settings.json via loadMainSettings().tracerStartupEnabled instead of querying systemctl.
Tracer disabled on Linux — session tracer feature is now Windows-only; Linux shows no tracer UI or background processes.
Process detection on Linux — fixed pgrep/pkill patterns to avoid false matches with electron process.
Native module loading — proper fallback to JS implementation when Rust module unavailable.
Build warnings — suppressed unused split_csv_line function warning in tracer.

App startup speed — splash screen created as the very first thing inside app.whenReady(); heavy work (native module warmup, tracer startup, update check) deferred via setImmediate/setTimeout; execSync calls replaced with async spawn-based equivalents; removed duplicate app.whenReady() chain; update check deferred to 8s after ready.

Renderer startup speed — applyRadius()/applyScale() run synchronously before React mounts (in main.tsx); removed 400ms fade-in on LayoutWrapper; removed artificial 1000ms splash delay; removed paintWhenInitiallyHidden: false which was preventing ready-to-show from firing.
Vite build config — added externalizeDepsPlugin() for main and preload; reduced terser passes from 2 to 1.
Window creation — backgroundColor set to #121214 matching --color-surface to prevent white flash; setupAppLifecycle() no longer wraps in a second app.whenReady().
App stuck on splash screen — removed paintWhenInitiallyHidden: false which suppressed the ready-to-show event.

Project launch spinner freezing — removed backdrop-blur-sm GPU compositor stall; replaced Tailwind animate-spin with a named @keyframes launcher-spin using willChange: transform; deferred IPC call via MessageChannel.postMessage until after paint is flushed; increased autoCloseOnLaunch delay to 2 seconds.
Project launch overlay minimum duration — overlay now stays visible for at least 1.5 seconds.
handleLaunch blocking renderer — changed from async/await to fire-and-forget .then() so the IPC round-trip never blocks the renderer event loop.
Linux engine launch blocked by KIO — engine executables now spawned directly instead of via xdg-open; xdg-open only used for non-executable files; spawned processes call .unref().
Engine detection ignores folder name — scanner no longer requires folders named UE_*; any directory containing Engine/Build/Build.version is recognised regardless of name.
Engine version read from Build.version — version always resolved from Engine/Build/Build.version instead of being stripped from the folder name.
Engine root vs parent path ambiguity — dual-mode scan logic: if the path itself is an engine root it is used directly, otherwise its subdirectories are scanned.
Linux engine scan paths stored as dedicated JSON — engine-scan-paths.json in the save folder, consistent with engines.json and projects.json.
Linux project scan paths stored as dedicated JSON — project-scan-paths.json, same pattern as engine scan paths.
Settings page engine scan section Linux-only — engine scan folder UI and UE_ROOT hint only shown on Linux.
UE_ROOT environment variable support (Linux only) — picked up automatically on every scan without needing the settings UI.
Native module loading in packaged builds — native/dist/index.js now resolves .node files from app.asar.unpacked when running inside an asar archive; falls back gracefully to null instead of throwing.
asarUnpack covers entire native/dist/ — all native module files unpacked from the asar so they can be loaded at runtime.
Linux build script missing electron-builder call — build:linux now runs electron-builder --linux --publish=never after the vite build; added build:linux:unpack for fast unpacked-only builds.

electron-builder.yml schema errors — removed invalid desktop.Name/Comment/Categories block, non-existent dmg.background reference, invalid artifactBuildStarted: null field; fixed linux.target to proper object form with arch; changed compression from maximum to normal.
asar: false + asarUnpack contradiction — changed to asar: true with asarUnpack so native modules are correctly extracted.
Rust validate_engine_folder hardcoded to Win64 — now uses #[cfg] platform conditionals to check the correct binary directory on Linux and macOS.
Glob patterns in Linux scan paths — removed paths like /usr/local/UnrealEngine* that fs.existsSync cannot expand; replaced with explicit directory scanning of common parent paths.
Duplicate const os / const platform in engine scan worker — fixed variable redeclaration causing a runtime error in the JS fallback scan path.
Projects page load order — saved projects shown immediately on page open; background scan runs after and only appends newly discovered projects without overwriting existing entries.
Unused imports removed — exec from child_process in projects.ts, os in fabScanner.ts and scanWorker.ts.
Missing fs import in platformPaths.ts — caused TypeScript errors when the Linux parent-directory scan code ran.
Engine scan folder settings (Linux) — new 'Engines' section in Settings (Linux only) to add custom parent directories for engine scanning.
UE_ROOT env var hint in settings — informational row explaining the UE_ROOT alternative to the UI-configured paths.
Linux Support — full cross-platform compatibility with Linux (AppImage and .deb packages).
Cross-platform path utilities (src/main/utils/platformPaths.ts) — platform-aware directory handling for AppData, Cache, Config, Engine installs, and project scanning paths.
Cross-platform process management (src/main/utils/processUtils.ts) — replaces Windows tasklist/taskkill with pgrep/pkill for Linux.
Linux build scripts — added build-linux.sh and updated package.json with Linux-specific build commands.
Native module cross-compilation — support for building native modules for Windows, Linux, and macOS.
Tracer binary cross-platform support — Linux process enumeration via /proc filesystem.
Platform-aware UI elements — registry settings hidden on non-Windows platforms.
Auto project scan using folder mention settings — configurable custom directories for automatic project discovery.
Project scan path configuration — new settings section for custom project scan directories.
Automatic update checking on app startup.
Electron Updater Guide — comprehensive documentation for auto-update functionality.
Project Analysis Documentation — detailed project structure and architecture analysis.
Added more details in Fab tab — asset cards now show thumbnails; clicking an asset goes directly to its Fab page.
Build system — updated to support multi-platform native module compilation.
File operations — cross-platform file/directory opening using xdg-open on Linux.
Engine scanning — platform-specific binary paths and executable names.
IPC handlers — enhanced with platform-aware path handling.
UI layout — improved responsive design and cross-platform compatibility.
Configuration system — migrated from hardcoded config to environment variables (.env).
Added .env.example template for environment variable configuration.
Updated BUILD.md and BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md with Linux build instructions.
Enhanced README.md with improved documentation.
Enhanced project deduplication logic to handle path variations (case sensitivity, backslash/forward slash differences) by normalizing project paths before comparison.
Added normalizeProjectPath function in src/main/store.ts and src/main/scanWorker.ts to convert paths to lowercase and standardize separators.
Used a Map with normalized keys in scanWorker.ts for deduping scanned projects; consistent normalized comparisons during merge operations.
Added renderer-side deduplication in src/renderer/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx with dedupeProjectList function to prevent duplicate cards when switching tabs or refreshing.
Prevent duplicate project cards when switching between tabs or pressing refresh by deduplicating scanned projects.
Checks only directory path (guaranteed unique) for preventing duplicate engines.
Prevent duplicate project import entries by deduplicating saved projects by projectPath and project ID.
Use actual .uproject filenames for project scans, imports, and launch paths.
Resolve Rust native module path more reliably in development and packaged builds.
Theme System — built-in themes (Dark, Darker, Midnight Blue, Warm Dark), per-token color overrides, saveable custom profiles.
Font Customization — choose font family and font size for the entire UI from Settings.
Border Radius Control — slider in Settings syncs border radius across all cards and UI elements.
Theme Profiles — save, apply, rename, and delete custom theme combinations.
Splash Screen — animated loading screen on app startup.
Resizable Sidebar — drag handle to resize or collapse the sidebar.
UE Tracer — Rust background process (unreal_launcher_tracer.exe) tracking engine and project usage, merges data on each scan.
Worker Threads — engine scanning, project scanning, and size calculation run in worker threads off the main process.
local-asset:// Protocol — serves local files directly to the renderer without base64 round-trips.
calculateAllProjectSizes IPC — batch size calculation for all projects at once.
Updates in Settings — auto-update and GitHub version check moved from About page to Settings.
BUILD.md — comprehensive build guide for developers.
Border radius not syncing on card components (was using hardcoded Tailwind classes).
Native module compilation and path resolution in packaged app.
Tracer executable path in packaged installer.
All require() imports replaced with ES6 imports.
All ESLint warnings and TypeScript diagnostics cleared.
Replaced MUI icons with Lucide icons throughout.
Main process refactored into index.ts, window.ts, updater.ts, ipcHandlers.ts, store.ts, utils.ts, types.ts.
List & Grid View — toggle between flat list and thumbnail grid for projects; preference persisted.
Batch Project Import — import up to 20 projects at a time; toast shows how many were skipped.
Redesigned Project Cards — list row with thumbnail, name, version badge, date, size, 3-dot menu; grid card with hover overlay.
3-dot Dropdown Menu — per-card actions via React portal (never clipped by scroll containers).
Neon Border on Hover — grid cards show accent glow on hover.
Stacking Toasts — colored accent bar, auto-dismiss after 4s, close button, max 5 visible.
Persist Last Page & View Mode — restored on next launch.
Error Boundary — recoverable crash screen instead of blank window.
openExternal Validation — only allows https: URLs.
Settings Cache — getSetting caches results in memory.
Favorites tab showing nothing — stale closure in filterForTab.
Dropdown menus clipped by scroll container — now via ReactDOM.createPortal.
Toast X button blocked by select-none — fixed pointer-events.
sandbox: true breaking IPC — reverted to sandbox: false.
Relative import paths broken after component folder reorganization.
ProjectsPage scanning on every tab switch — now scans once, filters client-side.
favoritePaths breaking useMemo — moved to React state.
Components reorganized into layout/, engines/, projects/, ui/, about/ subfolders.
Vite-bundled packages moved to devDependencies.
Recent Projects Tab — sorted by last-opened time from Saved/Logs timestamps.
App Version IPC — get-app-version exposes real app version to renderer.
GitHub Version Check — compares installed version against latest GitHub release.
Settings Page — initial settings interface.
Favorites System — mark and access favorite projects.
Toast Notifications — real-time feedback for user actions.
Single Instance Lock — prevents multiple app instances.
lastOpenedAt missing from ProjectData type.
ProjectCard useEffect missing async wrapper.
Log scanner recursing into subdirectories.
Recent tab falling back to createdAt.
Full Electron + React launcher UI with engine/project management.
Auto-update support via electron-updater.
Tailwind dark UI with custom gradients.
Initial MVP with engine detection and one-click launch.
